---
title: "Software"
---

## R Packages on CRAN

### serocalculator

Translates antibody levels from cross-sectional population samples into estimates of seroconversion rates and frequencies.

- [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=serocalculator)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/serocalculator)
- [Package Documentation](https://ucd-serg.github.io/serocalculator/)

### rwicc *(archived)*

Regression with interval-censored covariates: Application to cross-sectional incidence estimation.

- [CRAN Archive](https://CRAN.R-project.org/src/contrib/Archive/rwicc)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/rwicc)
- [Package Documentation](https://d-morrison.github.io/rwicc/)
- [Publication](https://doi.org/10.1111/biom.13472)

---

## My Repositories

Repositories under my personal GitHub account and the [UCD-SERG](https://github.com/UCD-SERG) organization, ordered by recency of contributions.

### rme

Regression Models for Epidemiology — an open Quarto textbook.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/rme)

### UCD-SERG/serocalculator

See [CRAN Packages](#r-packages-on-cran) above.

### rmb

Data sets from *Regression Methods in Biostatistics* (Vittinghoff et al.).

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/rmb)

### qwt

A template for building websites with Quarto.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/qwt)

### macros

Shared macro definitions for Quarto documents.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/macros)

### snapr

Convenient snapshot testing functions for R packages.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr)

### slidebreak

`slidebreak` shortcode extension for Quarto — insert slide breaks into Quarto revealjs presentations.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/slidebreak)

### revealjs-html-links

Quarto extension enabling HTML-style links in revealjs presentations.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/revealjs-html-links)

### div-anchors

Anchors for theorem-variant divs in Quarto.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/div-anchors)

### equation-anchors

Quarto extension for adding anchors to numbered equations.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/equation-anchors)

### qet

Quarto extension template.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/qet)

### pr.helpers

Generalization of pull-request helper functions from `{usethis}`.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/pr.helpers)

### github-stats

Tools for computing personal GitHub contribution statistics.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/github-stats)

### shiny.demos

Teaching demos for Shiny applications.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/shiny.demos)

### ping

Graph ping data in R.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/ping)

### EM.examples

Examples of EM algorithms.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/EM.examples)

### binom.se

Sample size calculations for Bernoulli probability estimation.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/binom.se)

### vax.eff

Code from "Estimating Vaccine Effectiveness from Linking Population-Based Health Registries" (Brookmeyer & Morrison, *American Journal of Epidemiology*, 2022).

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/vax.eff)

### CSICalc

Methods for estimating incidence from cross-sectional biomarker surveys.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/CSICalc)

### LA.Vax.Data

Pre-processes LA County vaccination rates by community statistical area.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/LA.Vax.Data)

### hybrid.charts.la

Adaptation of Wisconsin COVID-19 data visualization code for Los Angeles County.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/hybrid.charts.la)

### UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator

Shiny app for the `serocalculator` package.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_serocalculator)

### UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve

Shiny app to display antibody decay curves.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/shiny_decay_curve)

### UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence

Analysis of seroincidence of enteric fever in Juba, South Sudan.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/UCD-SERG/SSudanTyphoidSeroIncidence)

---

## External Contributions

Contributions I have made to repositories outside my own accounts, ordered by recency.

### ucdavis/rSuStaIn

R implementation of the SuStaIn (Subtype and Stage Inference) algorithm.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/ucdavis/rSuStaIn/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)

### etiennebacher/altdoc

R package for building documentation websites as an alternative to `{pkgdown}`.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/etiennebacher/altdoc)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/etiennebacher/altdoc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)

### ucdavis/win

UC Davis WIN (Workforce Inequity in Neuroscience) project.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ucdavis/win)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/ucdavis/win/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)

### ucdavis/serodynamics

Serodynamics modeling for infectious disease epidemiology.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/ucdavis/serodynamics/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)

### ucdavis/ettbc

Analysis code for enteric disease burden estimation.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/ucdavis/ettbc/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)

### UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm

Agent-based model of infection dynamics in K-6 schools during the COVID-19 pandemic.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/UCLA-PHP/school.epi.abm/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)
- [Publication](https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.02.27.21252535)

### sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem

Quarto extension for callout-style theorem environments.

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem)
- [Contributions](https://github.com/sun123zxy/quarto-callouty-theorem/pulls?q=is%3Apr+author%3Ad-morrison)
